title = “Associates”

author = “admin” +++

Current Ph.D. students

  • Yuanmo He (LSE)
  • Sarah Jewett (LSE)

Current Post-Docs

  • Jinshuai Ma

Alumni: Ph.D. students

  • Alexander Baturo (TCD, 2008), Dublin City University
  • Francesco Cavatorta (TCD, 2003), Professor, Université Laval
  • Ed Coughlan (TCD, 2015), Trinity College Dublin
  • Alan Duggan (TCD, 2020), Trinity College Dublin.
  • Jos Elkink (TCD, 2009), Associate Professor, University College Dublin
  • Karen Gilland (2001)
  • Anna Gwiazda (TCD, 2004), Senior Lecturer, King’s College, London
  • Jacqueline Hayden (TCD, 2002), Trinity College Dublin
  • Andres Hinrichsen (TCD, 2016)
  • Brighid Brooks Kelly (TCD, 2007), Winner of the 2008 Basil Chubb Prize for best PhD Dissertation
  • Matthew Kerby (2007), Senior Lecturer, Australian National University
  • Vanessa Liston (TCD, 2008)
  • Slava Mikhaylov (TCD, 2009) Professor, Hertie School of Governance
  • Susanna Pearce (TCD, 2004)
  • Matthew Wall (TCD, 2010), Senior Lecturer, University of Swansea
  • Thomas Däubler(TCD, 2012), Post-doc Fellow, MZES Mannheim
  • Raimondas Ibenskas (TCD, 2012), Associate Professor, University of Bergen
  • Tom Paskhalis (LSE, 2020). Postdoctoral Fellow, Center for Social Media and Politics, New York University.
  • Carolina Plescia (2013). Assistant Professor, University of Vienna, Winner of the 2014 ECPR Jen Blondel prize for the best PhD thesis in politics.
  • Catherine Riordan (TCD, 2013)
  • Magda Staniek (TCD, 2013)
  • Jan Stuckatz (LSE, 2019)
  • Brenda Van Coppenolle (LSE, 2014), Assistant Professor, University of Essex
  • Kohei Watanabe (LSE, 2017), Assistant Professor, University of Innsbruck

  • William Lowe, Hertie School of Governance

Co-authors

See “Co-authors” from https://scholar.google.com.au/citations?user=hp1p9TEAAAAJ&hl=en#

Institutional affiliations

  • School of Social Sciences, Singapore Management University, Dean and Professor of Computational Social Science, 2024-present
  • Department of Methodology, London School of Economics and Political Science, Professor of Computational Social Science, 2011-present; on unpaid leave 2024-2025
  • School of Politics and International Relations, Australian National University, Professor (Part-Time) 2019-2024
  • Social and Economic Data Sciences Unit, London School of Economics and Political Science, Director, 2016 - 2018
  • Department of Political Science, Trinity College Dublin, 1998-2010; 2012-2018 (Part-time)
  • Department of Politics, New York University, Visiting Professor 2014
  • Institute for International Integration Studies, Trinity College Dublin, Associate, 2004-2010
  • Department of Government, Harvard University, PhD student 1991-1998
  • Department of Political Science, Central European University, Lecturer, 1997-1998; Visiting Professor, 2011
